recommendations.title: The Initiation
recommendations.overview: An amnesiac sorority member who has been plagued by a recurring nightmare is stalked alongside other coeds by a killer in a deserted department store where they are completing a hazing ritual.

recommendations.title: Reeker
recommendations.overview: Strangers trapped at an eerie travel oasis in the desert must unravel the mystery behind their visions of dying people while they are preyed upon by a decaying creature.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: Messiah of Evil
recommendations.overview: A young woman searching for her missing artist father finds herself in the strange seaside town of Point Dune, which seems to be under the influence of a mysterious undead cult.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Alone in the Dark 2
recommendations.overview: When the night falls, and the creatures of the dark are crawling out of the shadows, there is only one man who stands between us and evil: Edward Carnby.

recommendations.title: Before I Fall
recommendations.overview: Samantha Kingston has everything. Then, everything changes. After one fateful night, she wakes up with no future at all. Trapped into reliving the same day over and over, she begins to question just how perfect her life really was.
